name: Easy Chicken Burritos
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the chicken breasts with forks.
2. Mix the shredded chicken, onion, sour cream, half a cup of salsa, salt, and pepper.
3. Wrap the mixture in burrito shells.
4. Place the wrapped burritos in a greased 13 x 9 pan.
5. In a separate bowl, mix the remaining salsa and soup together.
6. Pour the sauce over the shells.
7. Top with cheese.
8. Bake, uncovered, at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
Easy tip: Cook the chicken breasts ahead of time and assemble the burritos in the morning before work. When you get home, pour the remaining salsa and soup over the top, sprinkle with cheese, and bake.
